THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARSON, RANDY JONES, RENEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 424 PRESIDIO AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL FEB-01-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E THRU 11:59PM 1-31-97. DEFTS MAY REMAIN IN POSS THRU 2-28-97 UPON WRITTEN NOTICE TO PLTF BY 1-21-97; SEE JUDGMNT. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DMGS. SEC DEPOSIT HANDLED ACCORDING TO LAW. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. NO FURTHER STAYS PAST 2-29-97. PLTF WAIVES PMT OF $1000 DUE SANCTIONS.
